name: Amasu Okunyakaza Kwesiguli
description: Ukuhambisa olimele emlilweni noma endaweni ephephile ukuze alashwe. Indlela incike endaweni, ibanga, inani labatakuli, kanye nokulimala komuntu oshonile. Isivinini uma siqhathaniswa nokuqaphela umgogodla kuyisinqumo esihlakaniphile -- ku-TCCC, ukusongela kubaluleke kakhulu.
steps: UKUNAKEKELA NGAPHANSI KOMLILO: Buyisa umlilo kuqala uma uhlomile. Hambisa abalimele usebenzisa indlela yokudonsa eshesha kakhulu -- ungayeki ukwelapha endaweni yokubulala.
HUDULA NGOKUSHESHA (umhlengi oyedwa): bamba ikhola/hudula isibambo emahlombe, hudula ngemuva. Vikela ikhanda emthelela.
I-FIREMAN CARRY (umhlengi oyedwa): phakamisa olimele emahlombe amabanga amade -- kudinga ukuthi oshonile aquleke noma abambisane.
UKUTHWALA ABANTU ABABILI: abatakuli baxhuma izingalo ngaphansi komhlane nasemadolweni womuntu olimele. Ngokushesha kunokuhudula amabanga amafushane.
UDOTI ONGATHUNYIWE: beka izigxobo ezimbili ngamasentimitha angu-18 ukuhlukana. Weluka amajakhethi ngezigxobo ezinezinkinobho ngaphakathi. Hlola ngaphambi kokulayisha abalimele.
I-SKED LITTER: qaqa, slayida ngaphansi kokulimala, bopha futhi uvikeleke ngamabhande. Idinga abathwali abangu-2-4.
Uma ulayisha: phakamisa ukubala kwe-3, gcina ukuqondanisa kwekhanda / umzimba, unciphise ukunyakaza komgogodla uma kungenzeka.
Uma ukulimala komgogodla kusolwa futhi kungekho usongo: gcina ukuzinza okungaphakathi komugqa phakathi nokunyakaza. Umuntu oyedwa ozinikele ekulawuleni ikhanda.
Hambisa ikhava, bese uhlola kabusha i-ABC.
warnings: Okubalulekile kwe-TCCC: impilo > isitho > ukunakekelwa komgogodla. Ungabambezeli ukunyakaza ukusuka endaweni yokubulala ukuze uthole izinyathelo zokuphepha zomgogodla.
I-Fireman carry ivinjelwa ngokusoleka kokulimala komgogodla, ukuphuka kwe-femur, noma ukuhlukumezeka okungena ngaphakathi kwesisu.
Ama-litter athuthukisiwe: hlola isisindo ngaphambi kokwethemba umuntu olimele.
Ukuhambisa umuntu oshonile nge-tourniquet: hlola i-tourniquet ayikakaxegi ngesikhathi sokunyakaza.

pediatric.note: Izingane zilula -- umhlengi oyedwa uthwala isikhathi eside. Gcina ikhanda libe likhudlwana ngokulinganayo -- isikhungo esiphezulu samandla adonsela phansi lapho uphethe.

obstetric.note: Gwema ukuma okuvamile noma ukucindezela kwesisu. I-Lateral (uhlangothi lwesobunxele luyakhethwa) noma ukuthutha okuphansi nge-hip wedge yesokunxele.
